title: Iran war economic shocks will last 'months', says Australia's PM
summary_full: Anthony Albanese used a rare TV address to tell Australians that the "months ahead may not be easy" amid the global effects of the war.
summary_public: Anthony Albanese used a rare TV address to tell Australians that the "months ahead may not be easy" amid the global effects of the war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war economic shocks will last 'months'
